title: Create Ore Excavation Deposits
description: Multi-chunk ore deposits for Create Ore Excavation — richer the further you explore.
body:
# THANKS FOR 500 DOWNLOADS ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️
## Create Ore Excavation Deposits

Multi-chunk ore deposits for [Create Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation) — distance-driven richness, a Xaero map overlay and full multi-dimension support.

### In case of any problems or if you have any ideas I would love to help you and extend/fix the mod <3
---
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XfN8l56o/images/527d9fbdb672b578792d6edb925ae65c12a29714.png)
---

## What you get

- **Multi-chunk deposits** — irregular Perlin-shaped blobs of 2–40 chunks, all sharing one ore type. By default these **replace** Create Ore Excavation's own single-chunk veins (toggleable), so you get the deposit experience instead of duplicated ores.
- **World-map overlay** — solid coloured chunks on [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) with alpha-fade as the vein depletes and a hover tooltip showing remaining / initial units per chunk.- **Distance gradient** — a log-curve drives deposit size, richness, and which ores are eligible.
- **Per-chunk gradient** — the core chunk is peak yield; outer chunks fade down to a configurable floor (default 30 %).
- **Biome-aware** — configure spawn biomes (default: iron in mountains/taiga, gold in badlands/savanna, nether_quartz in nether biomes, etc.).
- **Multi-dimension** — choose which dimensions each type generates in; every dimension has its own tracking + reproducible seed.
- **Reveal policies** — four modes per type: `always` / `on_discovery` (walk near) / `on_proximity` (visible while close) / `on_prospect` (Vein Finder reveals)…
- **…with a reveal scope** — `per_player` (COE-like, each plays their own), `team` (shared with your party — **Open Parties and Claims**, **FTB Teams**, or a vanilla scoreboard team), or `global` (one player's find reveals it for everyone).
- **Deposit sharing** — `/coedeposits share` posts a clickable **[✚ Add to map]** offer in chat, share directly with a player, or bind a world-map key to share the deposit you're hovering. No OP needed.
- **Configurable discovery message** — friendly names + a custom chat template (`%name% %pos% %player% …`, colour codes), or turn the chat line off entirely.
- **Auto-adopt foreign veins** — COE veins from **add-ons & datapacks** (Create Ore Excavation Plus, CoE × Mekanism, OreCompatCreate, …) are automatically tracked on the map, named, and findable — no config needed. Disable or promote any of them in the in-game editor.
- **In-game editor & config screen** ([YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)) — author deposits, set reveal/scope, enable/disable veins, edit recipes (incl. an **input/coolant fluid** the machine consumes per cycle) — no JSON hand-editing.
- **KubeJS support** — define deposit types from `startup_scripts` via the `CoeDeposits` binding.


---

## Required

- [**Create Ore Excavation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-ore-excavation) — the host mod this extends. Required.
  - Which in turn requires [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

## Recommended / optional

- [**Xaero's World Map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) — the deposit overlay & share keybind. Soft dependency: without it generation works fine, you just lose the visual. [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) adds waypoints on discovery.
- [**YACL**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) — the in-game config screen + deposit editor (falls back to a basic screen if absent).
- **KubeJS**, **Open Parties and Claims** / **FTB Teams** — optional; enable the scripting binding and `team` reveal scope respectively. All reflection-based, no hard dependency.

_The mod's mixin is gated `client`-only, so dedicated servers without Xaero won't crash._

---

## Commands

Admin subcommands require permission level 2 (OP via `/op <player>`); **`share` and `accept` are available to every player**.

| Command | What it does |
|---|---|
| `/coedeposits share` | Post a clickable **[✚ Add to map]** offer for the deposit you're standing in — anyone can click to add it to their map. |
| `/coedeposits share <player>` / `share all <player>` | Share the current deposit (or everything you've discovered) directly with one player. |
| `/coedeposits tier` | Show distance + tier fraction at the player's position. |
| `/coedeposits list` | Top-10 nearest known deposits in the current dimension. |
| `/coedeposits types` | Roster of declared + auto-adopted deposit types with placed counts. |
| `/coedeposits here` | Info about the deposit owning the player's current chunk. |
| `/coedeposits scan` | Re-prospect around the player (no wipe). |
| `/coedeposits regenerate [seed]` | Wipe the current dimension + fresh prospect-scan. Optional seed override locks placement for reproducible patterns. |
| `/coedeposits seed` | Print the effective deposit seed (override vs world seed). |
| `/coedeposits refill` / `refill all` | Restore the deposit at the current chunk / every deposit in the dimension. |
| `/coedeposits delete here` / `delete chunk` | Remove a whole deposit / a single chunk from a deposit. |
| `/coedeposits place [<type> [<pos> [<amount> [<chunks>]]]]` | Admin-place a deposit. `amount<0` → infinite vein, `amount>0` → exact unit budget. |
| `/coedeposits replenish <rate>` / `replenish all <rate>` | Set the per-hour replenish rate for the deposit under the player, or every deposit in the dimension. `0` disables. |

---

## Compatibility

- **Add-on & datapack COE veins** are **auto-adopted** onto the map (named, tracked, findable) with no setup — and the **base mod's own veins are replaced by default** by this mod's managed deposits (toggle in the Generation config, or re-enable single veins in the editor). Promote any adopted vein into a fully-controlled type, or disable it, from the Deposits tab.
- **KubeJS** — define deposit types in scripts; COE's own recipes stay scriptable via COE's plugin.
- **Open Parties and Claims / FTB Teams** — power the `team` reveal scope (vanilla scoreboard teams work too).
- **JEI / Jade** — drilling recipes appear in the Drilling category and in-world tooltips.
- **Create: Steam 'n' Rails** — no conflict. Both place a map widget; `coedeposits-client.toml` lets you move/disable ours.
- **c2me** — works; the picker runs on the chunk's worker thread.

## Links

- **Source code & issues**: [github.com/RandomCodeGuys/create-ore-excavation-deposits](https://github.com/RandomCodeGuys/create-ore-excavation-deposits)
- **License**: MIT

For bug reports, feature requests, or PRs — please use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/RandomCodeGuys/create-ore-excavation-deposits/issues).
